title: Annotation Files and Datasets for CNV Detection Protocol
author: Chen, Xiang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains annotation files and example datasets used in the CNV detection protocol, including reference genomes, interval lists, and pedigree files.
steps_raw: This dataset contains annotation files and example datasets used in the CNV detection protocol, including reference genomes, interval lists, and pedigree files.
